prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BZLPNCHSET-17PC-JTBS16 Product Type: HOLE_PUNCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 17pc Bezel Burnishing Tool Set for Jewelry Design, Fine Metalwork, Wood Storage Box, Hardwood Chuck Handle, 3mm – 9mm Steel Punches Description: This bezel burnishing tool punch set or bezel setting punch set from ToolTreaux features 16 assorted concave, hardened steel punches and one polished hardwood chuck handle, all kept in a tidy wood storage box with metal closure to keep the punches tidy and organized. The tool set is intended for round bezel stone or other settings to ensure a precise, uniform and secure wall. The set can also be used for tube settings, as well as prong closures.

The set includes assorted punches with the following diameters, measured in millimeters:

2mm
2.75mm
3.75mm
4.5mm
5mm
5.25mm
5.5mm
6mm
6.5mm
7mm
7.5mm
8mm
8.5mm
9mm

If you’re wondering how this bezel burnishing tool set works, read on. Choose the appropriate-sized steel punch—one that is approximately a millimeter bigger than the outside diameter of the bezel you’re closing—and attach to the hardwood chuck handle; once attached and secure, place the punch over the setting and gently rotate, applying as little or as much pressure as needed, depending on the material you’re working with (e.

g. some crystals may be very soft and require much less pressure than in comparison to working with harder materials like diamonds or topaz). If you need some additional force, the hardwood handle can also be used in conjunction with a rubber or plastic mallet.

Lastly, as mentioned above, the bezel setting punch kit tool set comes with a handy wood box for organized storage of all the assorted steel punches; the box features built-in spots for each punch with etched sizing for each, as well as a spot for the hardwood chuck handle in the center. The wood box closes with a metal clasp to keep punches tidy and secure when not in use.

Let the creativity begin – happy setting. Search Terms: bezel setting tools set kit burnishing wood steel storage box metalworking art craft hobby jewelry making supplies design essentials prong fasteners punch ring stones artist designer burnisher tool chuck hardwood handle gemstone handmade Features: - BEZEL BURNISHING TOOL SET: This bezel burnishing tool punch set from ToolTreaux features 16 assorted concave, hardened steel punches and one polished hardwood chuck handle, all organized in a wood storage box; the tool set is intended for round bezel stone or other settings to ensure a precise and uniform wall; the set can also be used for tube settings or prong closures - HOW THE TOOL SET WORKS: Choose the appropriate-sized punch—one that is about a millimeter bigger than the outside diameter of the bezel you’re closing—and attach to the hardwood chuck handle; once secure, place the punch over the setting and gently rotate, applying as little or as much pressure as needed, depending on the material you’re working with - WOOD STORAGE BOX: The bezel setting or bezel burnishing tool set comes with the shown wood box for organized storage of all punches; the box features built-in spots for each punch size with etched sizing for each, as well as a spot for the hardwood chuck handle; the wood box closes with a metal clasp to keep punches tidy and secure - PUNCH SIZES INCLUDED: The range of hardened steel concave punch sizes included in this kit consist of the following diameters: 2mm, 2.75mm, 3.75mm, 4.5mm, 5mm, 5.25mm, 5.5mm, 6mm, 6.5mm, 7mm, 7.5mm, 8mm, 8.5mm and 9mm (measured in millimeters) - SPECIFICATIONS: Product Dimension: 3.1 x 6 x 2.8 inches; Wood Box Dimensions: 5-⅛ x 2-½ x 2-⅝ inches; Material: Hardened steel, hardwood handle, wood === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
